lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: WOAH! What the hell?! Let go of me!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: HEY! Who are you guys?

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: OOO AAA AAA

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: You humans have doomed us all!

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: OOO OOO AAA AAA AAA

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: What do you mean doomed us all? We were just having an argument.

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: OOO OOO AAA AAA

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: That was not JUST an argument.

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: That was a a Monkey Talk.

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: An extreme argument between two couples is called a Monkey Talk.

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: And a Monkey Talk as extreme as this... is enough to awaken... HIM

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: Him?

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: Yes... him... the beearer of doom and chaos. It is no other than... Klat Yeknom!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Who the hell is Klat Yeknom? Sounds like a dumbass.

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: QUIET YOU FOOL! HE CAN HEAR YOU!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Can you just let go of me please?

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: No. There is only one way to stop him from destroying the world.

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: We must offer you as a sacrfice.

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: What? NO PLEASE LET ME GO!

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: OOO OOO AAA AAA

lines.speaker: Monkey Goon
lines.text: Come my monkey brothers, let us bring the offering to our lord.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: WAIT STOP!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: BABY HELP ME! AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA!
